Event Title: Time Trial Clinic and Mystic Lakes Series Kickoff
Event Description:
Are you interested in learning how to ride faster, stronger, and longer?  “Time-trial" cycling simply involves riding without the assistance of a draft. At CRW, we are encouraging riders to challenge themselves and watch their fitness progress through an informal and welcoming TT program.

Whether you are training for a triathlon, looking to improve upon your Strava segment times, or simply looking for a new way to push yourself and develop fitness, time trials are an exciting aspect to cycling that anyone can participate in.

This Zoom session will outline the upcoming CRW Mystic Lakes Time Trial series, as well as provide some helpful tips regarding equipment, pacing strategy, and mental aspects to the discipline. 

Register in advance at https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tZwof-uqrD8iHtZdv14JdWrfgq1ucxqD5cbA
